requirements.description: Advisory code calls GLM 5.1 through a shared gateway using Anthropic-compatible messages and feature code cannot directly instantiate the SDK client.

tests.asserts: Gateway exposes complete/stream and no advisory feature file directly calls new Anthropic outside provider adapters.
Explicit GLM config remains behind provider gateway settings.

requirements.description: Fake smoke path returns deterministic advisor response and emits completed/failed provider telemetry with provider, latency, status, token/cost metadata, and error category where applicable.

tests.asserts: Fake success response is deterministic and emits completed telemetry.
Provider telemetry persists through shared event contract without raw content.

requirements.description: This story remains infrastructure-only and future user-facing FR coverage stays with workflow, recommendation, and Party Mode stories.

tests.asserts: AdvisoryModule exports the gateway and does not import future workflow runtime modules.

requirements.description: No-network automated tests use fake streaming/non-streaming responses and assert retry, timeout, latency, token-cost metadata, and call_retried telemetry.

tests.asserts: Fake streaming returns deterministic chunks plus token/cost metadata and completed telemetry.
Retryable provider failures emit call_retried and use injected no-wait sleeper.
Test/default execution is fake mode without GLM or Anthropic API keys.

requirements.description: GLM/provider error or timeout returns normalized ThinkTank error shape and emits failed provider telemetry.

tests.asserts: Timeout failure normalizes to stable error shape and emits failed telemetry without raw content.
Invalid requests produce a stable validation error shape.

recommendations.action: When Epic 2 adds user-facing provider calls or SSE, add workflow/API/E2E coverage there rather than expanding Story 1.5.
